content: We can frame Self-Refine's iterative unsupervised refinement pipeline as the first concrete operationalization of abstract LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where multiple perspective self-reflection methods (like Mirror or Self-Contrast) can be embedded as the feedback step within the Self-Refine framework to boost improvement beyond single-perspective self-feedback. This creates a modular architecture that separates the iterative refinement loop from the reflection logic, letting developers swap in different reflection perspectives without rewriting the core refinement workflow.
